title: FSW - Tailored Car Mats & Carpets - Classic Beetle POST 1967 11 PC SET (FULL CARPET) - Black Carpet - Anti Slip Mat - Non Slip Car Floor Mat, Granulated Backing, Black Cloth Binding - 11 Pc Floor Mat
features: TAILORED TO FIT CAR MATS: High-quality car mats that are fully tailored to fit a Classic Beetle POST 1967. A mat that is precision cut with laser to match the contours of the Classic Beetle POST 1967 model perfectly. This car mat comes in a 11 pc set and has an overall thickness of 4-5mm with a pile weight of 500gsm. These car floor mats have been specifically designed to protect the Classic Beetle POST 1967 vehicles floor from dirt, spillages, everyday wear and tear and salt corrosion

QUALITY CARPET & REINFORCED MATERIAL: Our car mats look sleek and complement the car interior with a modern carpet texture. We have manufactured this 11 piece set with a multi-layered construction consisting of 3 layers; pile, layer and backing, to provide you with a high quality and long lasting car interior. The drivers side car mat is fixed with a reinforced, high tensile strength heel pad to increase heel grip, durability and keep the black carpet protected from friction

ANTI SLIP BACKING TO PREVENT MOVEMENT IN FOOTWELL: Fitted with an anti slip granular backing, you can be assured that these mats will not move in the footwell area. The granulated mat backing acts as a built in retention system that locks the mat into position ensuring a non slip floor mat built for convenience. Locked into position there will be no bunching or folding of the car mat, so safety is guaranteed

EDGED WITH BLACK CLOTH BINDING: Each black floor mat is professionally edged with a cloth binding to create a smart finish which will look fantastic when placed in the footwells. FSW black car carpet provides you with a non slip mat whilst also leaving a stunning aesthetic finish and clean display for the Classic Beetle POST 1967

FIRST STOP WHOLESALE: We are a manufacturing company based in Yorkshire which specialises in manufacturing tailored to fit, ready made and safe fastening car mats and seat covers over a range of models. Each car mat is cut using the latest CAD technology ensuring a tailored fit. Our car mats are available in a number of different material qualities and colours. Choose between 3 types of our car mats: a 4-5mm carpet, a 3 mm rubber and a 5mm heavy duty rubber material
